en_definition: the quality of being useful, easy or suitable for somebody
a piece of paper, etc. that is attached to something and that gives information about it
covering the whole world
a small meal or amount of food, usually eaten in a hurry
materials used to wrap or protect goods that are sold in shops
to treat things that have already been used so that they can be used again
a place, usually including buildings, used for a particular purpose or activity
buildings, services, equipment, etc. that are provided for a particular purpose
a light strong material that is produced by chemical processes and can be formed into shapes when heated
made of plastic
a box, bottle, etc. in which something can be stored or transported
a building with glass sides and a glass roof for growing plants
that does not use much energy
(of sth) (used especially with uncountable nouns) a quantity of something
any substance like air that is neither a solid nor a liquid
the powerful effect that something has on somebody / something
to discover the facts about something; to calculate something exactly
pressure put on something that can damage it
pressure or worry caused by the problems in somebody's life
zh_definition: 精神压力；心理负担；紧张

en_definition: cows and bulls that are kept as farm animals for their milk or meat
(of food) kept at a very low temperature in order to preserve it
to make a connection between one and another
a person who is between 13 and 19 years old
zh_definition: （13 至 19 岁之间的）青少年

en_definition: the food that you eat and drink regularly
information about something
a thick white liquid food, made by adding bacteria to milk
(of a person) thin, in an attractive way
the impression that somebody / something gives to the public
a person or thing that causes something, especially a problem
a person with special knowledge, skill or training in something
the state of no longer having something or as much of something
used in speaking to emphasize a fact or a comment, or that something is really true
zh_definition: （在口语中用于强调事实）的确，真实地，事实上

en_definition: to be likely to do something or to happen in a particular way because this is what often or usually happens
used to introduce some new information that adds to or supports what you have said previously
the same in size, quantity, value, etc. as something else
zh_definition: （大小、数量、价值等）相同的，同样的；相等的

en_definition: something that you say or write which gives an opinion on or explains somebody / something
a person who introduces a television or radio show, and talks to guests
a person who invites guests to a meal, a party, etc. or who has people staying at their house
to help somebody remember something, especially something important
to say that you are sorry for doing something wrong or causing a problem
a sweet dish eaten at the end of a meal
a thing that makes something look more attractive on special occasions
a person who buys goods or uses services
used to show that something happened or is true although something else might have happened to prevent it
to use facts, evidence, etc. to show that something is true
having retired from work
food and other goods sold by a grocer or at a supermarket
to discover or prove the facts of a situation
to start or create an organization, a system, etc. that is meant to last for a long time
in a legal manner
to allow somebody to do something or to allow something to happen
to think or accept that something is true but without having proof of it
a measure of the amount of carbon dioxide that is produced by the daily activities of a person or company
zh_definition: 碳足迹（日常活动所产生的碳排放量的量度方式）

en_definition: a place where waste or rubbish / garbage is taken and left
a gas breathed out by people and animals from the lungs or produced by burning carbon
to ignore or forget something
a thick soft substance made from very finely chopped peanuts
a potato cooked in its skin in an oven
food that is quick and easy to prepare and eat but that is thought to be bad for your health
a machine from which you can buy drinks, etc. by putting money in
pay attention to or care for somebody / something
an event in which a car, train, plane, etc. is damaged and often someone is hurt
